cues.label: The state
cues.headline: Best run ending at i
cues.narration: best_here is the largest sum of a contiguous run that ends exactly at the current index.

cues.label: Extend or restart
cues.headline: Max of two choices
cues.narration: best_here is the max of the element alone or the previous best_here plus it — start fresh or extend.

cues.label: Negatives reset
cues.headline: A negative run is abandoned
cues.narration: Extending wins only when the previous run was positive, so a negative running sum resets automatically.

cues.label: Track the best
cues.headline: Global max of best_here
cues.narration: The answer is the largest best_here ever seen, because the optimal subarray ends somewhere.

cues.label: The winner
cues.headline: The run [4,-1,2,1] = 6
cues.narration: Here the best run is 4, -1, 2, 1 summing to 6, found the moment best_here reaches 6.

cues.label: Constant space
cues.headline: Two scalars, one pass
cues.narration: Because each step needs only the previous best_here, you carry two scalars — O(n) time, O(1) space.
